registerkey.name: RegisterKey
registerkey.description: Grants permission to register a KMS key to use for a support permit

createsupportpermit.name: CreateSupportPermit
createsupportpermit.description: Grants permission to create a support permit

deletesupportpermit.name: DeleteSupportPermit
deletesupportpermit.description: Grants permission to delete a support permit

getaction.name: GetAction
getaction.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a support action

getsupportpermit.name: GetSupportPermit
getsupportpermit.description: Grants permission to retrieve a support permit

listactions.name: ListActions
listactions.description: Grants permission to list available support actions

listsupportpermitrequests.name: ListSupportPermitRequests
listsupportpermitrequests.description: Grants permission to list support permit requests

listsupportpermits.name: ListSupportPermits
listsupportpermits.description: Grants permission to list support permits

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

rejectsupportpermitrequest.name: RejectSupportPermitRequest
rejectsupportpermitrequest.description: Grants permission to reject a support permit request

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource
